options.text: Sorry, I have a lot of work to do tonight.
I'm not really thirsty, can I just get a glass of water?
I'm not interested in drinks, can we go to a movie instead?

content.explanation: 正确答案 "Sorry, I have a lot of work to do tonight." 表达了用户有事推辞聚餐邀约的意思。其他选项中， "I'm not really thirsty, can I just get a glass of water?" 不合适的场景回答， "What time are we going?" 询问时间而不是回应邀约， "I'm not interested in drinks, can we go to a movie instead?" 改变了邀约内容。
content.scenarioHint: 同事邀请参加下班后聚餐，你有事推辞

options.text: Come on, it’s just one drink—you always say no!
I don't know, let me think about it.
That sounds like a lot of work, I'm not sure I can make it.
I'm not interested in drinking, thanks.

content.explanation: 正确答案“Come on, it’s just one drink—you always say no!”表达了拒绝邀请的语气，同时指出自己经常拒绝，这样可以让同事理解并尊重自己的决定。其他选项不正确，因为它们不能有效地表达拒绝邀请的意图或语气。
content.scenarioHint: 同事提出邀请，用户需要回应

options.text: I’d love to, but I have a piano lesson tonight. Can I join you next week?
Thai food? No thanks, I hate spicy food.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了积极开头+具体理由+未来邀请，符合场景最佳实践。选项1理由牵强，选项3直接批评食物，选项4是接受而非拒绝，不符合题干要求。
content.speakerText: Hey, the team is heading to that new Thai place after work—want to come?
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿，团队下班后要去新开的泰餐厅，一起来吗？
